# Legacy Product Requirements

name: Legacy Pocket Practice
mission: Build an application consumer mobile learning companion for one short daily lesson.
namespace: legacy-pocket-practice
lifecycle: active
owners:
  - product-owner
runtime_adapters:
  - adapter.flutter
workflow_adapters:
  - adapter.figma
success_criteria:
  - A learner can complete one short daily lesson.
included_scope:
  - A consumer mobile application for daily learning.
excluded_scope:
  - Production deployment
